meaning: n.濮旀墭,鎵挎媴涔夊姟,璧炲姪
examples: He was released on bail pending committal proceedings.
The doctor was non-committal about when I could drive again.
Mr. Hall is non-committal about the number of jobs that the development corporation has created.
He is due back at York Magistrates' Court for a committal hearing on 9 May.
Your loyalty strategy should move people beyond a non-committal preference for your brand to heartfelt dedication.
